mrcommons 1.67.0
  • Reference

Read JRC IDEES

Source: R/readJRC_IDEES.R
readJRC_IDEES.Rd

Read the IDEES data base from JRC #nolint

Usage

readJRC_IDEES(subtype)

Arguments

subtype

one of

  • 'Emission': read worksheets from the Emission Balance files

  • 'Energy': read worksheets from the Energy Balance files

  • 'Industry': read worksheets from the Industry files

  • 'Transport': read worksheets from the Transport files

  • 'MBunkers': read worksheets from the Bunkers files

  • 'Residential': read worksheets from the Residential files

  • 'Tertiary': read worksheets from the Tertiary (Services and Agriculture) files append '_2021' to get the updated data from 2021 (only available for some sectors)

Value

A magpie object.

Author

Michaja Pehl, Falk Benke, Robin Hasse

On this page

Developed by Benjamin Leon Bodirsky, Kristine Karstens, Lavinia Baumstark, Isabelle Weindl, Xiaoxi Wang, Abhijeet Mishra, Stephen Wirth, Mishko Stevanovic, Nele Steinmetz, Ulrich Kreidenweis, Renato Rodrigues, Roman Popov, Florian Humpenoeder, Anastasis Giannousakis, Antoine Levesque, David Klein, Ewerton Araujo, Eva Bleidorn, Felicitas Beier, Julian Oeser, Michaja Pehl, Debbora Leip, Michael Crawford, Edna Molina Bacca, Patrick von Jeetze, Eleonora Martinelli, Felix Schreyer, Bjoern Soergel, Pascal Sauer, David Hötten, Robin Hasse, Gabriel Abrahão, Pascal Weigmann, Jan Philipp Dietrich.
